text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nice shot! ♪ Right on the green! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I did a round of golf and got my best score ever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing like the watching the ball zoom
through the blue sky after a solid hit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You should join me next time, Trainer! I can be
your coach and teach you all the tips and
tricks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mejiro Palmer thoroughly enjoyed
her day off!
